title: dForge Data Views
description: Data view definitions for a dForge module

viewType.description: View display type. Optional — omitted or unknown values fall back to 'grid' at runtime.

description.description: Optional description text shown on view cards

dataSources.description: Data sources providing data for this view

filter.description: Default filter criteria (applied to all dataSources unless one declares its own)

groupByField.description: Column code of a dropdown/flags/reference field to group cards by

dateField.description: Column code of the date/timestamp field used to place events on the calendar

titleField.description: Column code of the field displayed as event title. Defaults to the entity's toString template.

colorField.description: Optional column whose value drives the event pill color. For dropdown/flags columns, colors come from params.options rich form; otherwise a deterministic hash is used.

parentField.description: Column code of the self-referencing FK (parent record)

labelField.description: Field to display as node label (defaults to entity toString)

iconField.description: Field containing a Bootstrap icon class per node

titleField.description: Column code of the primary display field

subtitleField.description: Column code of the secondary display field

levels.description: Hierarchical child levels for expandable list rows

entityCode.description: Entity code for this child level

foreignKey.description: FK column in the child entity linking back to the parent

columns.description: Columns to display inline for each child row

groupByField.description: Column code to group diagram nodes by (e.g. 'module', 'project')

defaultHiddenGroups.description: Group values to hide by default in the diagram

matrixViewConfig.description: Matrix (pivot) view: rowAxis × colAxis grid with a value-source cell entity holding one record per (rowKey, colKey).

rowAxis.description: Row axis values: an entity's records ('dataset') or a column's dropdown options ('dropdown').

colAxis.description: Column axis values: 'dataset', 'dropdown', or a generated 'date' window.

matrixDatasetAxis.description: Dataset axis — axis values are the records of an entity.

labelField.description: Column shown as the axis header label

keyField.description: Column whose value is the match key. Defaults to the axis entity's PK.

lockedField.description: Boolean column; when true, that axis value's cells are read-only even in edit mode (e.g. a period's 'closed' flag)

filter.description: Optional filter scoping which axis records load (e.g. row axis scoped to 'statement == IncomeStatement')

hideEmpty.description: COLUMN axis only — hide axis values that have no cell record in any row (e.g. periods with no posted activity), so a P&L doesn't trail off into empty months. Data-driven and reactive; ignored if it would hide every column.

sort.description: Sort applied to the axis records

matrixDropdownAxis.description: Dropdown axis — axis values are the options of a dropdown/flags column, read from its params.options.

column.description: 'entity.column' reference to a dropdown/flags column whose options are the axis

matrixDateAxis.description: Date axis — axis values generated from a date window rather than entity records. Column axis only.

window.description: How many columns are shown. v1: 'week' (7 days, Monday-start).

matrixCellConfig.description: The value-source cell of a matrix — one record per (rowKey, colKey).

entity.description: Cell entity code (the view's primary data source)

rowKey.description: Cell column matching the row axis key

colKey.description: Cell column matching the column axis key

fields.description: Cell columns rendered inside each cell, in order

cardinality.description: v1 supports a single record per cell

drill.description: When true, read-only cell values become clickable and open the cell's record (where its child sets are shown)

seedFromRow.description: On empty-cell insert, copy values from the row axis record into the new cell record: { cellField: rowAxisField }

seedCurrentUser.description: On empty-cell insert, set these cell fields to the current user id

pinned.description: Pin column to left or right edge

level.description: Nesting level (0 = root, 1+ = detail). Defaults to 0

label.description: Human-readable label for this data source (used in master-detail tabs)

columns.description: Column configuration — strings or objects with width/visibility

parentSetField.description: Set field name on parent entity linking to this detail level

filter.description: Per-source filter criteria; overrides the view-level filter for this source

order.description: Per-source sort order (array of {c, d} entries, where d is 'asc' or 'desc')

filter.description: Canonical dForge filter expression. Either a single condition `{c, o, v}` or a group `{g, i: [...]}`. Used by data views, reports, folders (row-level security), and the API.

o.description: Operator: eq, neq, =, !=, gt, gtEq, grEq, lt, ltEq, in, nIn, like, isNull, isNotNull, etc.

v.description: Comparison value. Scalars, arrays (for in/nIn), or parameter references like '@param_code'.

i.description: Group items: nested conditions or sub-groups
